title: Sanex Derma Care Sensitive 48-Hour Antiperspirant Roll-On Deodorant 6x50ml – long-lasting freshness against sweat and odour – gently cares for skin – contains 0% alcohol*
features: 48-HOUR FRESHNESS: Our roll-on antiperspirant helps protect against sweat and odour for up to 48 hours so you can take on the day with confidence
SOFT ON SKIN: Our specially formulated antiperspirant deodorant is gentle on underarm skin and treats it with the respect it deserves
FRESH AND DRY: Our roll-on antiperspirant deodorant helps to keep you feeling fresh, dry and confident no matter what the day has in store
MINIMISES RISK OF IRRITATION: Our 0% alcohol* antiperspirant deodorant cares for your gentle underarm skin and helps minimise the risk of irritation
RECOMMENDED BY EXPERTS: Our long-lasting antiperspirant has been dermatologically tested and is certified by the British Skin Foundation
description: Product Description Stay fresh and dry for the day ahead with our Sanex Derma Care Sensitive Antiperspirant Roll-On Deodorant. Our dermatologically tested, 48-hour antiperspirant deodorant offers effective protection against sweat and odour while taking gentle care of your sensitive underarm skin. Certified by the British Skin Foundation, our sensitive deodorant is formulated with 0% alcohol* and has been specially designed to minimise the risk of unwanted irritation on your gentle underarm skin. Not to mention, our alcohol-free deodorant roll-on effectively helps to keep skin fresh and dry for up to 48 hours. Prepare for whatever the day has in store with our strong antiperspirant that helps skin perform at its healthy best. *Does not contain ethanol. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Do not use on broken skin. Stop use if rash or irritation occurs.
